final:
module data_register(
  input clk,
  input rst_n,
  input [7:0] data_in,
  output reg [7:0] data_out
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~rst_n) begin
      data_out <= 8'b00000000;
    end
    else begin
      data_out <= data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
